metadata.title: Vaelrix Chibi 64x64

construction.promotionRule: construction cells are reference metadata; final art lives in coordinates

symmetry.reason: Chibi construction is centered, but lighting, hair clusters, hands, sash, and coat shadows are intentionally asymmetric.

aseprite.compositeOrderPolicy: Face/Eyes is composited above Highlights in the flat lattice so skin highlights do not overwrite eyes.

indexed.name: Ink Outline
indexed.usage: Main silhouette and hard internal cuts

conversionNotes: Converted from Aseprite row-run blueprint into a flat PixelBrain lattice export packet.
No image or PNG preview was generated.
Final coordinates are collision-free topmost cells only; original row-runs are retained under metadata.aseprite.sourceLayerRuns.
The asset declares symmetry as none to avoid a strict-mirror fatal on intentionally asymmetric hair, shadow, and accessories.

diagnostics.message: Face/Eyes composited above Highlights to preserve eye readability in flat PixelBrain coordinates.
